raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX American Express charged me twice for the amount of {$4200.00} ( {$8500.00} ). 

Since XXXX I have the autopay set up to pay my monthly balance to American Express. 
American Express claims that I submitted the payment two times.

Im only asking to get back on my bank account {$4200.00} especially because on XX/XX/XXXX I will have to pay federal tax as well as XXXX tax. 
American Express wanted to send me a check to my XXXX address but Im abroad right now and can not get mail so I asked for a wire transfer or for a check via email! 
So last week AmEx under my request made a wire transfer to my bank account which is the sane bank where money were taken. I was told that within 24, 48 or Max 72 hours I would get my money back. Yesterday, more than a week later, I called again and was told that the transaction failed. They give me no explanation for that. The agent made a new wire transfer and added it can take up to 12 business day this is the time frame I asked a claim number and I was given this refund Ref ID XXXX XXXX disgusted by the greediness of this behavior intended to get profit out of money. 
I pay {$350.00} for American Express member and I wont renew it!
